description: Composition Grey formal trousers with a checked weave, made of 69% polyester, 25% viscose and 6% linen, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures, brand badge at the side of the right pocket, belt loops on the waistband, reinforced stitch detailing, a zip and button closure and extendible hems Fit Slim fit Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations Crafted from a polyester/viscose/linen blend, this pair of formal trousers from the arrow Premium Collection is creatively engineered with moisture management qualities. This trouser offers a comfortable and dry fit, while its auto fit adjustable waistband offers an exemplary comfort and a flattering silhouette, making this a great addition to your formal wardrobe. Pair it with a formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 34 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
